workout.description: **Mobility:** 30 min gentle comprehensive session 10 min light foam rolling (calves, hamstrings, glutes) 15 min gentle stretching (focus: recovery) 5 min PTT drills (towel scrunches, toe yoga)
10 min light foam rolling (calves, hamstrings, glutes) 15 min gentle stretching (focus: recovery) 5 min PTT drills (towel scrunches, toe yoga)
**Mobility:** 10 min PTT exercises (ankle inversions, arch doming)
**Mobility:** 10 min post-run routine (foam roll calves, hamstrings, glutes)

actual_performance.notes: 30 min Easy (FinalSurge workout - overrides baseline plan). Some soreness in legs, calves, shins - expected for first run back post-marathon. HR slightly elevated (147 vs target <145) due to heat/humidity (76F, 77%). Good execution overall.

**Strength:** PRIMARY Session #1 - Lower Body + Core (45-50 min) Warmup: 10 min (bike/walk, hip circles, leg swings, bodyweight squats) A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 10-12 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 3 × 10-12 per leg B2. Forearm Plank: 3 × 30-45 sec C1. Pallof Press: 3 × 12-15 per side C2. Single-Leg Calf Raise: 3 × 15-20 per leg **Mobility:** 10 min evening PTT session

Warmup: 10 min (bike/walk, hip circles, leg swings, bodyweight squats) A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 10-12 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 3 × 10-12 per leg B2. Forearm Plank: 3 × 30-45 sec C1. Pallof Press: 3 × 12-15 per side C2. Single-Leg Calf Raise: 3 × 15-20 per leg **Mobility:** 10 min evening PTT session
